case_title: CAL TRADING COMPANY VS. GRAFFEO COFFEE ROASTING COMPANY, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAL TRADING COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GRAFFEO COFFEE ROASTING COMPANY, INC.
